The '''Colicoid Eradicator''' was the predecessor of the feared [[Droideka/Legends|Droideka]] produced by the [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Gutkurr-GAW.jpg|thumb|left|A [[Gutkurr/Legends|gutkurr]] and Eradicator droid handler]]

The droid was nearly three meters tall and stood on a sturdy pair of legs. It was armed with heavy weapons, which consisted of a pair of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]] and a pair of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. They were also one of the first droids that utilized a personal [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] system, though it was somewhat limited and was somewhat enhanced with its successors. The droids were equipped with internal computer processors which allowed the droid to work independently in combat without relying on a remote control unit, though its limited intelligence limited it to simple missions.<ref name="A&E" /> It was known for its ability to put a large amount of fire on target.<ref name="GAW" />
